note: Deduped against legal-freelance reports from 2026-05-06 through 2026-05-19. 7-day window. LinkedIn URLs found via Google/Bing only — no direct LinkedIn scraping. Only leads scoring 55+ retained.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — Corporate Attorney, Investment Funds (Remote Contract #6939)
leads.industry: Flexible legal staffing / Private equity & venture client

fitDetails.practice_area: Investment funds / VC financing / fund finance — direct fit with Katie's fund-formation lane
fitDetails.seniority: 5+ years law firm or VC firm investment transaction experience
fitDetails.fund_focus: Core mandate: investment transactions, structuring/negotiating financing, diligence, fund formation for PE/VC client

intentDetails.remote_flex: Fully remote, candidates can be anywhere in US
intentDetails.recency: Active posting on Latitude open opportunities, indexed via Jobright as job 6939c49b56b68f3dc4e724d8
intentDetails.apply_path: Direct application via latitudelegal.com/jobs — easy apply, Latitude recruiter follow-up

leads.compensationText: $225,000–$300,000 annualized; full benefits at 20+ hrs/wk (medical, dental, 401k, CLE stipend)
signals: Latitude already running 4+ remote fund/corp roles — pipeline depth
Investment transactions + financings is Katie's exact lane
leads.notes: Highest-fit lead of this run. Same staffing firm Katie has been tracking on prior scrapes (5/12, 5/14, 5/19). New posting variant explicitly fund/VC focused. Pitch angle: emphasize fund-side documentation experience, LPAs/side letters, and bandwidth for 20+ hrs/wk to unlock full benefits.

leads.name: Startup Venture Advisors (SVA) — Fractional Senior Attorney (Remote)

fitDetails.practice_area: Startup and venture capital fund representation — formation, financings, M&A
fitDetails.comp_credible: Law-firm rate band (not posted explicitly but standard for fractional partner-track)
fitDetails.fund_focus: Firm represents both emerging companies and the funds that invest in them

intentDetails.recency: Posted on FractionalJobs.io (active board for fractional roles)

leads.compensationText: Not stated (law-firm rate; flexible fractional or FT)
signals: Reps both startups AND the funds that invest in them — perfect 2-sided fit
Boutique = direct partner-level work, no big-law overhead
leads.notes: Strong-fit boutique. CA bar is the gate — if Katie has CA bar (or reciprocity path) this is a clean fractional entry. Pitch angle: dual-track experience reping both GP/LP fund work AND portfolio-co support.

leads.name: Allocate — Senior Fund Formation Attorney (Remote, U.S.)

fitDetails.practice_area: Fund formation, onboarding, fund filings, regulatory compliance, corporate governance
fitDetails.seniority: 6+ years fund formation (in-house or law firm)
fitDetails.comp_credible: Market-credible (Allocate is well-funded; fund-formation attorneys at this seniority $170K-$220K range)

intentDetails.engagement_model: Remote in-house role (open to contract per Ladders listing)
intentDetails.recency: Active posting on Ladders + BeBee + Allocate careers page

leads.compensationText: Not posted publicly; market-credible for fund formation specialist
signals: Explicit fund formation focus — LPAs, side letters, regulatory filings
Platform company supporting GPs and LPs
leads.notes: Could be pitched as fractional/contract embedded counsel — Allocate's platform model means lots of GP/LP fund work. Worth a direct outreach even if posted as FT; many growth-stage cos open to part-time at senior level.

leads.name: Latitude Legal — Fractional Franchise Counsel (Remote, Part-Time Engagement)

fitDetails.practice_area: Franchise law — MUTAs, transfers, terminations, multi-state compliance. Adjacent to commercial contracts; not core fund/VC.
fitDetails.seniority: 5+ years franchise law (or transferable commercial contract experience)

signals: Adjacent practice area — pitch if franchise-side experience is in book
leads.notes: Off the central ICP (franchise vs fund/corporate) but the structural fit is excellent — fractional, remote, high comp, Latitude already a known channel. Skip if Katie has no franchise reps; include if she'd take adjacent commercial work.

leads.name: Galt Pharmaceuticals — Fractional Compliance Counsel (Atlanta Metro / Remote, 15-18 hrs/wk)

fitDetails.practice_area: Ethics & compliance program design, federal/state/international regulatory adherence. Adjacent to corporate governance; not fund-side.

intentDetails.apply_path: LinkedIn easy apply + direct LinkedIn message to Galt

signals: Direct fractional model, structured at 15-18 hrs/wk
Industry-specific (pharma) — fits if Katie has pharma/biotech reps; otherwise a stretch
leads.notes: Lower fit on practice area (pharma compliance vs fund/corp). Include only if Katie wants to broaden into healthcare-adjacent fractional work. Strong structural signal — explicit fractional, CEO-reporting.

leads.name: Robert Half — Commercial Contracts Attorney (Remote, Facility Services, $57-66/hr)

fitDetails.practice_area: Commercial agreements supporting nationwide facility services — vendor, customer, procurement, SaaS contracts
fitDetails.seniority: Day-to-day legal support; 4-8 years contracts experience typical

signals: Lower comp band — bandwidth play, not premium engagement
leads.notes: Off the premium ICP on comp ($57-66/hr vs Katie's typical $125+/hr targets), but Robert Half is a useful staffing channel relationship to maintain. Consider as filler bandwidth or as an entry to RH's broader counsel pipeline.
